title: Combat Structures
description: Adds structures and Lore to your world
body:
# 
  ![Lore Book](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/67f90c4f4d4fc7116f66cf600ebb09a4d184a328.jpeg)
Combat Structures and Lore just got it's 2.0 update!
# **The LORE Update!**

~Adds over 80 structures and features to your world

~Adds a new background story that ties many of the structures together across a common theme.

~Adds Lore and hidden knowledge in the form of written books scattered across the land.

~Adds a new tool to help you rid the land off the Tainted Obsidian. You'll need to find the recipe in the ancient texts. It is not awared via advancement or otherwise.

~Clues on where to find the texts are located in various structures. Find all three texts to learn the recipe.

~Adds three new mobs: Tainted Zombie variants.. Stronger, meaner and tougher.

~And much much more!

Version 2.0 also adds many new structuers and features to the Nether and to the Oceans.

This mod also adds a new architectural block: Tudor style beam and plaster style architectural blocks. These blocks can be crafted using Mud, white dye and spruce logs to create different plaster and beam style blocks.

DEV'S

Yes, you may use this in your modpacks

Props to [TinyTaru](https://modrinth.com/user/TinyTaru) for helping to provide art for the new textures.

Additional Structure Mods by me that fit well with Combat Structures:

The Pit: [https://modrinth.com/mod/the-pit](https://modrinth.com/mod/the-pit)

~A procedurally generated deep pit like structure with many rooms, loot and mobs. 100% vanilla freindly. Fits the same theme as "Combat Structures"

More Tree Sizes:  [https://modrinth.com/mod/more_tree_sizes](https://modrinth.com/mod/more_tree_sizes)
Used to be a part of the combat structure mod, but now is it's own mod. Adds more vanilla tree sizes.  100% vanilla friendly.

Achaeology ruins: [https://modrinth.com/mod/archaeology-ruins](https://modrinth.com/mod/archaeology-ruins)

Adds more ruins with suspicios sand and gravel. 100% vanilla friendly with lots of new structures, loot and traps.
